top_signals.title: Iran threatens to extend conflict ‘beyond the region’ if U.S. and Israel resume attacks
top_signals.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guard on Wednesday threatened to extend the Middle East conflict "beyond the region" if the U.S. and Israel resume attacks against Tehran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The AI Boom Is Making Warsh’s Bond-Market Bind Even Worse
top_signals.summary: To judge by a key bond-market signal, the AI boom is only worsening Kevin Warsh’s inflation problem.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wes Streeting urges Labour to help youth ‘as an emergency’
top_signals.summary: Wes Streeting has called on the government to support young people “as an emergency” in a resignation speech that accused Sir Keir Starmer of leading a losing battle against Reform UK.  Streeting said he supported Chancellor Rachel Reeves’ economic agenda before the Iran war broke out and upended policy-making, though he suggested the Labour leadership [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Crude Inventories Drop by Most on Record as Exports Surge
top_signals.summary: US crude inventories, including strategic reserves, plunged by a record as soaring exports start to erode domestic supply cushions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid ETFs draw $22.3 million in early inflows, analysts point to ‘good sign of organic interest’
top_signals.summary: Hyperliquid ETFs have outpaced bitcoin and ether funds in adjusted inflows during parts of their early trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Authentic Brands Group expects IPO in next 12 months as new CEO steps in, founder tells CNBC
top_signals.summary: Authentic Brands Group, the firm behind Reebok and Champion, is bringing in a public company veteran as its next CEO, signaling it's readying for an IPO.
